definition: Bitcoin Core full-node RPC rail. Talks to bitcoind via JSON-RPC (getblockchaininfo, getnewaddress, listunspent, sendtoaddress under operator judgment) with a mempool.space read fallback. Node primitives via python-bitcoinlib. Agents read/verify; agents never sign spends — signing is edge/judgment only.
headline: BRMSTE · Bitcoin Core · full-node RPC rail

settlement.policy: receive/settle only · no holding wallets · agents never sign spends

credentials.policy: env-only · never committed · never asked in chat
